name: versioning
description: Public interface versioning substrate. Owns the ApiVersion entity + DeprecationNotice entity + resolver chain (URL, header, query, webhook subscription, GraphQL) + payload transformer registry + version scheme adapters (SemVer, CalVer) + RFC 8594 Sunset workflow. Covers four surfaces: (1) REST endpoints (`/api/v1/...`), (2) content-negotiated payloads (`Accept: application/vnd.academorix.v2+json`), (3) webhook subscribers pinned to specific versions (`WebhookSubscription.api_version`), and (4) GraphQL schema versioning (feature-flag guarded, ships with #[VersionedField] + @deprecated support). Distinct from foundation's `HasVersions` trait, which handles ROW-LEVEL model history (snapshots + rollback for Eloquent models) — this module handles SURFACE-LEVEL version lifecycle. Both concerns coexist via the same word 'version' but tackle different problems.

list.name: AsPayloadTransformer
list.description: Auto-registers a payload transformer class with the PayloadTransformerRegistry. Build-time compiler discovers + validates the transformer signature. Transformers are pure functions: `transform(array $payload): array`.

list.name: VersionedField
list.description: Marks a field on a data class (Spatie Data / GraphQL type) with its version lifecycle. Renderers strip fields based on the resolved request version. Feature-flag guarded via `versioning.graphql_support`.

list.name: AsApiSurface
list.description: Marks a controller or GraphQL resolver as versioned. Build-time compiler ensures every declared version has a resolver present.

resolverChain.description: Ordered list of version resolvers. First to yield a non-null result wins. Config in `versioning.resolvers.order`.

resolvers.name: query
resolvers.note: Enabled only in non-production by default — for public docs + integration testing.

resolvers.name: graphql
resolvers.matches: @api(version: v2) directive on the operation OR schema-inferred

schemes.description: Version scheme adapters. Selected per-ApiVersion via the `scheme` column. Determines how versions are compared for order + range queries + wildcard matches.

supported.name: semver
supported.description: Standard SemVer. Major bump = breaking. Wildcards: ^1.0 (any 1.x), ~1.2 (any 1.2.x).

supported.name: calver
supported.description: CalVer. Preferred for consumer-facing APIs where release cadence matches calendar. Every release is potentially breaking.

central.description: Public deprecation surface + version catalog for docs + integration.

platform-admin.description: Cross-tenant version management + release / deprecate / sunset workflow.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing read-only catalog of API versions + active deprecation notices affecting them.
